retry_reason: Put operations always succeed and are irreversible; retrying would cause a double-free.
contract_summary: This function releases two references on a seccomp_filter: one on the filter's .users refcount (via __seccomp_filter_orphan) and one on the .refs refcount (via __put_seccomp_filter). It is a put wrapper that completes the release of a filter tree attached to a task. After calling this function, the caller must no longer use the orig pointer. This function is typically called when a task's seccomp filter is being freed or replaced. It does not transfer ownership to the caller; it releases the caller's reference. No return value to check. Must be called with appropriate locking or as part of cleanup path.

judge.reason: The function only calls two put operations on different refcounts of the seccomp_filter, with no other logic. Its sole purpose is releasing references.
